channel.title: Windows on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Windows on Arrans github.io

item.title: WerWolv/ImHex
item.description: 🔍 A Hex Editor for Reverse Engineers, Programmers and people who value their retinas when working at 3 AM.

item.title: lencx/ChatGPT
item.description: 🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: A Windows and Office activator using HWID / Ohook / KMS38 / Online KMS activation methods, with a focus on open-source code and fewer antivirus detections.

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speaker recognition using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, C/C++, Python, Kotlin, C#, Go, NodeJS, Java, Swift, Dart, JavaScript, Flutter

item.title: jart/cosmopolitan
item.description: build-once run-anywhere c library

item.title: alacritty/alacritty
item.description: A cross-platform, OpenGL terminal emulator.

item.title: microsoft/sudo
item.description: It’s sudo, for Windows

item.title: microsoft/PowerToys
item.description: Windows system utilities to maximize productivity

item.title: microsoft/terminal
item.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

item.title: twpayne/chezmoi
item.description: Manage your dotfiles across multiple diverse machines, securely.

item.title: ventoy/Ventoy
item.description: A new bootable USB solution.

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: tldr-pages/tldr
item.description: 📚 Collaborative cheatsheets for console commands

item.title: PowerShell/PowerShell
item.description: PowerShell for every system!

item.title: rancher-sandbox/rancher-desktop
item.description: Container Management and Kubernetes on the Desktop

item.title: keepassxreboot/keepassxc
item.description: KeePassXC is a cross-platform community-driven port of the Windows application “Keepass Password Safe”.

item.title: Foundry376/Mailspring
item.description: 💌 A beautiful, fast and fully open source mail client for Mac, Windows and Linux.

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source Spotify client that doesn’t require Premium nor uses Electron! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: wailsapp/wails
item.description: Create beautiful applications using Go

item.title: quexten/goldwarden
item.description: A feature-packed Bitwarden compatible desktop client

item.title: leanflutter/window_manager
item.description: This plugin allows Flutter desktop apps to resizing and repositioning the window.

item.title: Nheko-Reborn/nheko
item.description: Desktop client for Matrix using Qt and C++20.

item.title: invoke-ai/InvokeAI
item.description: InvokeAI is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models, empowering professionals, artists, and enthusiasts to generate and create visual media using the latest AI-driven technologies. The solution offers an industry leading WebUI, supports terminal use through a CLI, and serves as the foundation for multiple commercial products.

item.title: maharmstone/btrfs
item.description: WinBtrfs - an open-source btrfs driver for Windows

item.title: microsoft/calculator
item.description: Windows Calculator: A simple yet powerful calculator that ships with Windows

item.title: inbucket/inbucket
item.description: Disposable webmail server (similar to Mailinator) with built in SMTP, POP3, RESTful servers; no DB required.

item.title: pvolok/mprocs
item.description: Run multiple commands in parallel

item.title: Lymphatus/caesium-image-compressor
item.description: Caesium is an image compression software that helps you store, send and share digital pictures, supporting JPG, PNG, WebP and TIFF formats. You can quickly reduce the file size (and resolution, if you want) by preserving the overall quality of the image.

item.title: lucasg/Dependencies
item.description: A rewrite of the old legacy software “depends.exe” in C# for Windows devs to troubleshoot dll load dependencies issues.

item.title: mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
item.description: mRemoteNG is the next generation of mRemote, open source, tabbed, multi-protocol, remote connections manager.

item.title: vkohaupt/vokoscreenNG
item.description: vokoscreenNG is a powerful screencast creator in many languages to record the screen, an area or a window (Linux only). Recording of audio from multiple sources is supported. With the built-in camera support, you can make your video more personal. Other tools such as systray, magnifying glass, countdown, timer, Showclick and Halo support will help

item.title: microsoft/windows-rs
item.description: Rust for Windows

item.title: therecipe/qt
item.description: Qt binding for Go (Golang) with support for Windows / macOS / Linux / FreeBSD / Android / iOS / Sailfish OS / Raspberry Pi / AsteroidOS / Ubuntu Touch / JavaScript / WebAssembly

item.title: CalcProgrammer1/OpenRGB
item.description: Open source RGB lighting control that doesn’t depend on manufacturer software. Supports Windows, Linux, MacOS. Mirror of https://gitlab.com/CalcProgrammer1/OpenRGB. Releases can be found on GitLab.

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: ubuntu-flutter-community/musicpod
item.description: Music, radio, television and podcast player for Ubuntu, Windows, MacOs and Android

item.title: OrangeDrangon/android-messages-desktop
item.description: Android Messages as a Cross-platform Desktop App

item.title: oOthkOo/whatsapp-desktop
item.description: Unofficial WhatsApp Desktop Client for OSX, Linux and Windows. Build with Electron.

item.title: muesli/duf
item.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility - a better ‘df’ alternative

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (kdbx 3.x) compatible.

item.title: adrg/xdg
item.description: Go implementation of the XDG Base Directory Specification and XDG user directories

item.title: vcmi/vcmi
item.description: Open-source engine for Heroes of Might and Magic III

item.title: rodrigocfd/windigo
item.description: Windows API and GUI in idiomatic Go.

item.title: etlegacy/etlegacy
item.description: ET: Legacy is an open source project based on the code of Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory which was released in 2010 under the terms of the GPLv3 license.

item.title: cogentcore/core
item.description: A free and open source framework for building powerful, fast, and elegant 2D and 3D apps that run on macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and the Web with a single pure Go codebase, allowing you to Code Once, Run Everywhere.

item.title: yeahitsjan/pawxel
item.description: Lightweight screenshot tool for designers & developers

item.title: uTox/uTox
item.description: µTox the lightest and fluffiest Tox client

item.title: donnemartin/saws
item.description: A supercharged AWS command line interface (CLI).

item.title: go-flutter-desktop/go-flutter
item.description: Flutter on Windows, MacOS and Linux - based on Flutter Embedding, Go and GLFW.

item.title: tomboy-notes/tomboy-ng
item.description: Next generation of Tomboy

item.title: ksnip/ksnip
item.description: ksnip the cross-platform screenshot and annotation tool

item.title: salvadordf/CEF4Delphi
item.description: CEF4Delphi is an open source project to embed Chromium-based browsers in applications made with Delphi or Lazarus/FPC for Windows, Linux and MacOS.

item.title: microsoft/Windows-Machine-Learning
item.description: Samples and Tools for Windows ML.

item.title: microsoft/WindowsAppSDK-Samples
item.description: Feature samples for the Windows App SDK

item.title: azkadev/whisper
item.description: Whisper Dart is a cross platform library for dart and flutter that allows converting audio to text / speech to text / inference from Open AI models

item.title: ad-on-is/resticity
item.description: A beautiful cross-platform UI for restic backup.

item.title: FireCubeStudios/Clippy
item.description: Bring back Clippy on Windows 10/11!

item.title: arran4/send-to-google-photos
item.description: A desktop utility to help easily upload files to google photos from what ever shell

item.title: 1dustindavis/gorilla
item.description: Munki-like Application Management for Windows

item.title: FourCoreLabs/wintoken
item.description: Mainpulate, Steal and Modify Windows Tokens in Go
